## 2026-03-16 15:07

Full rebuild of all 14 English papers + 28 translations (da, es).

- Aesthetic Computer '26 [en] → aesthetic-computer-26-arxiv.pdf
- From setup() to boot() [en] → piece-api-26-arxiv.pdf (already current)
- Repository Archaeology [en] → repo-archaeology-26-arxiv.pdf
- Dead Ends [en] → dead-ends-26-arxiv.pdf
- Citation Diversity Audit [en] → citation-diversity-audit-26.pdf

- KidLisp '26 [en] → kidlisp-26-arxiv.pdf
- KidLisp Language Reference [en] → kidlisp-reference-26-arxiv.pdf

- AC Native OS [en] → ac-native-os-26-arxiv.pdf

- All 14 papers [es] → *-es.pdf

- 11 English PDFs were stale (tex sources updated in a66d11772 but PDFs never rebuilt)
- This is the first tracked build via papers/cli.mjs
